title: Agent Skills Standard and SKILL.md Anatomy · Extension Lens: Portable Contract
summary: Create a minimal standards-conforming skill for a repeated review workflow. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext portable contract increment in a valid focused agent skill. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep skill logic portable while documenting host-specific integrations separately.
Route the agent to only the references or scripts needed for the current variant.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Portable Contract evidence
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-portable-contract-nuifrj: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Portable Contract into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-portable-contract-nuifrj:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
